name: Burke County Recreation Department
description: Burke County Recreation Department is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Waynesboro, GA. There are 6 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Jonathan Broxton Park
description: Come play pickleball at Jonathan Broxton Park in Waynesboro, GA! There are 6 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.
